title: filago germanica subsp. spathulata
intro: Filago germanica subsp. spathulata, also known as the narrow-leaved cress or spotted cudweed, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Filago germanica subsp. spathulata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
